description: TAM anchor_step sweep: anchor_step=4 (PGD on 4 opt_step unroll). All else fixed: pgd_delta=1.5, mining_opt_steps=3, gc_loss. Compare to q220 (anchor_step=2). Large anchor_step: trajectory far from x_pos, expects minimal neg_dist or divergence. SUCCESS: val_mse < 0.00975 and anchor_dist in (0.2, 5.0).
notes: TAM anchor_step=4 variant. Anchor PGD on 4 opt_step trajectory point instead of 2. Large anchor distance: trajectory point far from x_pos. If anchor too far, mining may diverge or neg_dist may become unreliable. Key diagnostic: anchor_dist should be in (0.2, 5.0). If anchor_dist > 5, trajectory moved too far.
